title: GoldenEye 007
description: 4-player multiplayer deathmatch — most kills in a time limit wins. The definitive couch multiplayer game.

p1_kills.notes: AR: 80079F1B. P1 total kills across all opponents. 8-bit value (0-255).

p2_kills.notes: AR: 80079F87. P2 total kills. Offset +0x6C from P1 kills.

p3_kills.notes: AR: 80079FFB. P3 total kills. Offset +0x6C from P2.

p1_ammo_9mm.notes: AR: 810CDC96. P1 9mm ammo — use as proxy for alive/active state (0 = may be dead/respawning).

multiplayer_health_mode.notes: AR: 8002B499:0039 = License to Kill mode (1-hit kills). Set to 0x39 for instant-kill tournament mode.

tournament_rules: Multiplayer deathmatch. 5-minute timed match. Most kills wins. Recommended: License to Kill mode (0x39 at 0x02B499) for fast decisive rounds. Complex stage (Facility, Temple, or Bunker) agreed beforehand. All slappers or PP7 only for fairness.
notes: Kill addresses confirmed from libretro-database AR codes (7232 cheats, multiplayer section). P1-P4 kills at regular 0x6C byte offsets. Deaths at much larger offsets (~0x2A80 apart) — all confirmed from same cheat file.
sources: libretro-database/cht N64 AR: 80079F1B P1 kills, 80079F87 P2 kills, 80079FFB P3 kills, 8007A06F P4 kills
libretro-database/cht N64 AR: 800CA53B P1 deaths, 800CCFBB P2, 800CFA3B P3, 800D24BB P4
name: GoldenEye 007
